user.title: Swelligence
user.description: Choose the sports you care about and your default forecast provider. You can add favourite spots afterwards from the integration's options.

data.use_llm: Use an AI Task agent for semantic verdicts

rider.title: Rider profile & quiver
rider.description: Your weight and the kit you own drive kite/wing size recommendations and whether a spot is actually rideable for you. Enter sizes in m² separated by commas (e.g. 7, 9, 12). Leave weight blank to disable personalisation.

spot_prefs.title: Tune a spot
spot_prefs.description: Pick the spot whose per-sport preferences you want to adjust.

spot_prefs_sport.title: Choose a sport
spot_prefs_sport.description: Which sport at {spot} do you want to tune?

spot_prefs_edit.title: {sport} preferences
spot_prefs_edit.description: Tune {sport} at {spot}. Wind directions are the wind's compass origin you prefer — for surf, set the offshore direction(s) for this beach. Leave a field blank to keep the default.

add_spot.title: Add a spot
add_spot.description: Coordinates are pre-filled from your Home Assistant location. The provider locks onto the nearest model grid automatically.

data.use_llm: Use an AI Task agent for semantic verdicts

error.duplicate_spot: A spot with that name already exists.

abort.no_spots: Add a spot first before tuning preferences.
